runners.formComment: Won two starts back over 515m at Launceston. Last start he finished 3rd over 461m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (26.13) behind Serious Swagger in a Restricted WIN on April 9. Draw likely to suit. Most reliable when jumping from this box. Leading chance.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 9 over 461m at this track behind Serious Swagger beaten 8 lengths (26.48) in a Restricted WIN. Leading contender.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2 lengths over 278m at Launceston in a handy (15.96), beating Our Ellie. Has the ability to be in the finish.

runners.formComment: Hit the frame latest (16.36) when third at Launceston in a Special conditions race. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Will need some luck to feature.

runners.formComment: Won at Launceston over 515m two starts back but then was a little disappointing last start, fading at the end of 461m at this track. Others make more appeal.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.75 lengths in 19.39, beating Call Sergeant. Last start finished 7th over 515m at Launceston beaten 13 lengths (30.69) behind Ivory Japan in a Grade 5 on April 7. Likely to find this a bit tough.

runners.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (26.37) over 461m at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate but is worth plenty of thought.

runners.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 340m at this track. Others favoured this time.

runners.formComment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 2.5 lengths behind Unconvicted over 461m. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th on March 18 over 525m at Taree Super Track behind Spin Around Blue beaten 9 lengths (31.12) in a Grade 4/5. Placed two back at The Gardens. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out rounding the 1st turn, came together and lost ground.
